backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the EduMap backend with data types (StudentProfile, College, ChatMessage), persistent maps for profiles and colleges, a content-based scoring recommendation algorithm, and college CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping each EduMap feature (visual theme, home page, profile form, recommendations, etc.) to the source files, UI components, test IDs, and confidence levels that implement them.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries for four frontend files: guidelinesData.ts, Guidelines.tsx, CollegeDetail.tsx, and ChatbotWidget.tsx.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, primary, accent, chart colors, sidebar) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the EduMap React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script tag.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with all application routes (Home, Profile, Recommendations, Compare, Map, Guidelines, CollegeDetail) wrapped in a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: Floating chatbot widget fixed to the bottom-right corner that manages conversation state, renders message bubbles with timestamps, shows suggested questions, and calls the backend askChatBot mutation.
frontend/src/components/CollegeCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a college's name, location, type, stream, fees, rankings, and an optional match-score progress bar, with links to the detail page and a compare toggle button.
Renders a side-by-side comparison table for multiple colleges, highlighting best/worst values for fees, rankings, eligibility, and displaying details like courses, deadlines, and required documents.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header, responsive navigation links, a mobile menu, and a chatbot widget rendered around page content.
frontend/src/data/guidelinesData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for country-specific college admission guidelines, including required documents, steps, entrance exams, and timelines for multiple destinations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching colleges, recommendations, comparing colleges, submitting a student profile, and sending chatbot messages via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system, and adds utility classes for gradients, card hover effects, and Leaflet map styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider contexts.
frontend/src/pages/CollegeDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single college, displaying full info including fees, streams, type, deadline, and a custom SVG mini-map of its location.
frontend/src/pages/Compare.tsx: Page allowing users to search and select 2–4 colleges for side-by-side comparison using a ComparisonTable component.
frontend/src/pages/Guidelines.tsx: Tabbed page showing step-by-step admission guidelines (documents, timeline, etc.) for multiple study destinations using static guidelinesData.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page showcasing platform features, a how-it-works section, and key stats with links to other app pages.
frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx: Interactive SVG world map page that plots college locations with country and stream filters, showing a detail card on marker click.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: React page component for the student profile form, allowing users to input stream, percentage, budget, interests, region, and college type preferences. Saves data to localStorage and submits to the backend via the useAddStudentProfile hook.
frontend/src/pages/Recommendations.tsx: React page that fetches and displays AI-powered college recommendations, supporting sorting by score/fees/ranking and a compare list of up to 4 colleges. Handles loading, error, and no-profile states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Sora), OKLCH-based color tokens (teal, amber, semantic UI colors), border radius variants, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: JSON file tracking the overall EduMap project state including version, architectural notes, feature inventory, known issues, and image requirements for the AI-ML powered college admission navigator platform.
